/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libmetabun_plugin.so -o package/addons/meta-bun/bin/libmetabun_plugin.so CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/core/metabun_plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/network/bridge_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/network/rcon_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/events/event_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/players/player_stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/process/process_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/menus/menu_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/convars/convar_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/hooks/sdk_hooks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/generated/connectionless_netmessages.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/generated/engine_gcmessages.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/generated/netmessages.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/generated/network_connection.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/generated/networkbasetypes.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/generated/networksystem_protomessages.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/generated/source2_steam_stats.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/generated/valveextensions.pb.cc.o "CMakeFiles/metabun_plugin.dir/workspace/sdks/hl2sdk-cs2/tier1/convar.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN" /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -ldl
